chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal 82 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURES OF JUDGES ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection(s). 2. For hearing of Main Case. 3. For hearing of CMA 1181/2021. 10.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Umar, advocate holds brief for Mr. Mushtaq Hussain Qazi, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Shahid Ali, advocate for the respondents 2 & 3. Mr. Sajid Ali, advocate for respondent 4. This High Court Appeal is pending since 2021 without any significant progress. Even today, merely a brief is being held and adjournment has been sought on behalf of the appellant without any cogent reason or justification whatsoever; therefore, the instant High Court Appeal is dismissed for non- prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
